testcase.name: End-to-End System Tests › Complete Login and Navigation Workflow › should complete full authentication and navigation workflow
End-to-End System Tests › Complete Login and Navigation Workflow › should handle complex redirect scenario
End-to-End System Tests › Session Persistence and Recovery › should maintain session across browser refresh
End-to-End System Tests › Session Persistence and Recovery › should handle session timeout gracefully
End-to-End System Tests › Error Handling and Recovery › should handle network interruptions during login
End-to-End System Tests › Error Handling and Recovery › should handle rapid navigation attempts
End-to-End System Tests › Cross-Browser Compatibility › should work on different viewport sizes
End-to-End System Tests › Performance and Load › should handle multiple rapid logins
End-to-End System Tests › Performance and Load › should load pages within reasonable time
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Direct URL Access with Redirects › should redirect from /users to auth and back to /users after login
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Direct URL Access with Redirects › should redirect from /admin to auth and back to /admin after login
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Direct URL Access with Redirects › should redirect from /projects to auth and back to /projects after login
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Direct URL Access with Redirects › should handle nested routes like /users/profile
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Direct URL Access with Redirects › should handle nested admin routes like /admin/users
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Manual Redirect Parameter Testing › should handle explicit redirect to /users
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Manual Redirect Parameter Testing › should handle explicit redirect to /admin
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Manual Redirect Parameter Testing › should handle explicit redirect to /projects
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Manual Redirect Parameter Testing › should handle encoded redirect parameters
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Default Redirect Behavior › should redirect to /users by default when no redirect parameter
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Default Redirect Behavior › should handle invalid redirect parameters gracefully
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Default Redirect Behavior › should handle external redirect attempts securely
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Error Cases and Edge Cases › should handle multiple redirect parameters
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Error Cases and Edge Cases › should handle malformed redirect parameters
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Error Cases and Edge Cases › should handle very long redirect parameters
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Authenticated User Redirect Behavior › should redirect authenticated users away from auth page to default route
Redirect Flow Integration Tests › Authenticated User Redirect Behavior › should ignore redirect parameter for already authenticated users
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect to auth when accessing /users without authentication
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect to auth when accessing /admin without authentication
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect to auth when accessing /projects without authentication
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Unauthenticated Access › should allow access to public routes
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Authenticated Access › should allow access to /users when authenticated
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Authenticated Access › should allow access to /admin when authenticated as admin
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Authenticated Access › should allow access to /projects when authenticated
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Authenticated Access › should still allow access to public routes when authenticated
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Authenticated Access › should redirect already authenticated user from auth page to dashboard
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Redirect Flow Integration › should preserve redirect after successful login
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Redirect Flow Integration › should handle complex redirect paths
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Redirect Flow Integration › should handle redirect with query parameters
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Session Management › should maintain authentication across page refreshes
Protected Routes - Navigation and Access Control › Session Management › should handle session expiry gracefully
User Dashboard › should load user dashboard with welcome message
User Dashboard › should display user information correctly
User Dashboard › should provide navigation to other sections
User Dashboard › should allow access to user profile
User Dashboard › should handle user settings access
Admin Dashboard › should load admin dashboard
Admin Dashboard › should allow access to admin users page
Admin Dashboard › should allow access to admin settings
Admin Dashboard › should allow access to system maintenance
Projects Page › should load projects page
Projects Page › should allow access to create project
Cross-Page Navigation › should allow navigation between authenticated pages
Cross-Page Navigation › should maintain authentication state across navigation
Cross-Page Navigation › should handle browser back/forward navigation
End-to-End System Tests › Complete Login and Navigation Workflow › should complete full authentication and navigation workflow
